About SIND
Who
We Are.

A lean industrial services unit based in Chandigarh, India. We close the gap between manufacturing capability and market visibility.

Slatch Industries (SIND) was built on a single observation: Indian manufacturers are underrepresented online, underdocumented internally, and undersold globally. Facilities with world-class capability are invisible to buyers who could use them.

We fix that. We walk into factories, document what they can do, build their digital presence from scratch, and connect them to an order network that rewards quality, efficiency, and reliability.

Operating as a registered Indian sole proprietorship based in Chandigarh — the CH·IN in our logo — with GST, MSME, and import-export infrastructure, we handle the business development that most facility owners don't have time for.

Beyond business development, we provide contract-basis skilled labour — welding, assembly, mechanical, fabrication, and hydraulic work — for facilities with overflow capacity needs or specific project requirements.

No Fluff Consulting
Every engagement produces a tangible output. No billable hours without deliverables.
Data-First
We treat every facility as a dataset. Better data means better order matching and better decisions.
India-Based, Export-Ready
Registered in Chandigarh, operating with international documentation standards.
Scalable by Design
We start small, prove the model, then scale. No large retainers before we've shown ROI.
Owner-Led
You deal directly with decision-makers at every stage of the engagement.

Contract Skilled Labour
Hands-On.
On Demand.

Qualified tradespeople available on contract for production overflow, project bursts, or specialist work you don't carry in-house.

Welding
MIG, TIG, arc welding for structural and precision fabrication work.
Assembly
Mechanical assembly for production lines, subassemblies, and equipment builds.
Fabrication
Sheet metal, structural steel, and custom fabrication for industrial applications.
Mechanical
Machine maintenance, fitting, and mechanical engineering support on-site.
Hydraulic
Hydraulic system installation, repair, and maintenance for industrial machinery.

Our Services
What We
Deliver.

Eight service lines — all designed for manufacturers, fabricators, and industrial operators who need execution, not presentations.

01
Basic Online Presence
We set up a fully optimized Google Business Profile for your manufacturing facility — photos, categories, services, contact, and map pin. In exchange, we ask for a verified Google review. This is the entry point. Every other digital service builds on top of this.
Google BusinessMaps ListingReview Generation
02
Video Marketing
We shoot machines in operation, processes in motion, and finished products being made — and distribute this content across Instagram and other platforms. Direct orders go straight to the client. Indirect orders requiring SIND's engineering oversight go through us.
Video ProductionInstagramOrder Generation
03
Social Media Management
Full-contract social management. We own your content calendar, create posts, handle engagement, and build platform authority consistently over time. For facility owners who understand the value of online presence but don't have time to maintain it.
Content StrategyPlatform ManagementMonthly Retainer
04
Manufacturing Database Inclusion
We audit your facility's resources — machines, capacity, materials, lead times — and add you to the SIND vendor database. When we receive orders, we analyze which vendor offers the best balance of price, timeframe, and quality. Database inclusion means first-look access to matched orders.
Vendor NetworkCapability AuditOrder Matching
05
Time Bleed & Workforce Audits
We map your complete labour workflow and identify where time is being wasted — redundant processes, inefficient sequencing, tasks that could be outsourced at a fraction of the internal cost. The output is a concrete savings plan, not a general recommendation report.
Process MappingLabour AnalysisCost Reduction
06
Full Factory Documentation
We convert your entire facility operation — every process, every invoice flow, every money-in and money-out — into a structured, readable handover document. Built for ownership transitions, investor diligence, change of management, or ISO audit readiness.
Process DocumentationFinancial MappingHandover Ready
07
Machine & Service Listings
Got idle machines, surplus capacity, or services you're not fully monetizing? We list them on relevant platforms for sale or hire. We handle listing, photography, and buyer communication. Unused assets sitting in a facility are cash waiting to be unlocked.
Asset MonetizationPlatform ListingsIdle Capacity
08
Contract Skilled Labour
Qualified tradespeople deployed on a contract basis for production overflow, project bursts, or specialist work you don't carry in-house. Services include welding (MIG, TIG, arc), assembly, structural fabrication, mechanical fitting, and hydraulic system work.
WeldingAssemblyFabricationMechanicalHydraulic

Business Development · Sales & Marketing
BD&SM
Division.

The engine that finds clients, closes deals, and builds market position for every facility in the SIND network.

B
Business
Identifying and qualifying new industrial clients
D
Development
Building long-term commercial relationships and structures
S
Sales
Door-to-door and direct sales execution in industrial zones
M
Marketing
Content and platform authority that attracts inbound demand
The Approach
How It Works.
Phase 01
Hunt
We go door-to-door in industrial zones and manufacturing clusters. We identify facility owners, assess their current state, and qualify them as potential clients. Old-school sales done with precision targeting.
Phase 02
Engage
We present a clear value proposition with a low-risk entry point — a Google profile, a listing, a single audit — to demonstrate capability before scaling the engagement.
Phase 03
Expand
Once trust is established and results visible, we expand into full-service retainers — social management, workforce audits, full documentation. The model grows naturally with client confidence.
Phase 04
Network
Every audited facility joins the SIND vendor database. As the network grows, so does order flow. Clients benefit from a collective manufacturing intelligence system — not just their own visibility.
Target Clients
Who We Work With.
Manufacturers
Metal, fabrication, machined parts — any facility with production capacity and underutilized reach.
Fabricators
Structural, custom, sheet metal shops with skilled labour and intake capacity to fill.
Fleet Operators
Transport and logistics operators needing documentation and digital visibility.
MSMEs
Registered enterprises ready to scale but without the BD infrastructure to do it.
Want SIND Working
for Your Business?
Get in touch — we respond within 24 hours
